name: moviola-directing
description: Direct MOVIOLA Drafts with the browser-equivalent Assistant Director contract and canonical Directing Rules.

interface.shortDescription: Use the browser-equivalent MOVIOLA Assistant Director.
interface.longDescription: Author, edit, review, and render MOVIOLA Scenes and Cuts through its MCP tools while following the same working contract and Directing Rules as the browser Assistant Director.
defaultPrompt: Review my MOVIOLA Draft and suggest the next directing decision.
Build the next Scene with complete Cuts and explain the choices.
